motorcycles.summary: Popular middleweight naked bike with the CP2 parallel-twin engine.

custom_sections.title: Chain & Sprocket
custom_sections.content: Standard chain: 525 × 114 links. Front sprocket 15T, rear 42T. Chain slack: 35–45 mm at midpoint.

fields.label: Recommended Grade
fields.value: SAE 10W-30, API SJ or Pro Honda GN4

motorcycles.summary: Lightweight single-cylinder streetfighter with premium components.

custom_sections.title: Valve Clearance
custom_sections.content: Intake: 0.10 mm, Exhaust: 0.15 mm (cold engine). Check every 30,000 km.
